retry_reason: put operation is unconditional once node is in list; if not in list it's a no-op; retry would not change outcome.
contract_summary: Removes the lapb_cb from its list (if linked) and releases the reference count that the list held via lapb_put. After this call, the lapb_cb may be freed if the reference count reaches zero; the caller must not access the lapb_cb afterward. If the lapb_cb is not in a list (node.next NULL), the function is a no-op. This is a put wrapper that also performs the necessary list deletion before releasing the reference.
